title: RNA Extraction from Sterivex Filters and cDNA Library Generation
author: Paraskevi (VIvian) Mara
materials: For Sterivex filters, follow steps A2–A3.
For Sterivex samples, follow steps A7–A9.
For Sterivex samples, follow steps A10–A11.

steps.title: Thaw Sterivex filters on ice and...
steps.instruction: Thaw Sterivex filters on ice and expel RNAlater (if used) using a 3 mL syringe. If stored at −80 °C, ensure no residual liquid remains inside the Sterivex; if present, remove it using a 3 mL syringe.

steps.title: Seal the lower end (nipple) of...
steps.instruction: Seal the lower end (nipple) of each Sterivex filter with parafilm or Sterivex caps. Additionally, seal the lower rim with parafilm to prevent leakage.

steps.title: Add beads to approximately 1/10 of...
steps.instruction: Add beads to approximately 1/10 of the Sterivex filter volume (using beads from the 5 mL kit tubes provided by manufacturer, or UV-sterilized beads).

steps.title: Aliquot 1
steps.instruction: Aliquot 1.8 mL of PM1 buffer into 2 mL Eppendorf tubes and heat at 65 °C for 5 min.

steps.title: Using a clean 3 mL syringe...
steps.instruction: Using a clean 3 mL syringe fitted with a 22G needle, transfer the heated PM1 buffer into each Sterivex.

steps.title: Add 100 µL of molecular-grade 2-mercaptoethanol...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of molecular-grade 2-mercaptoethanol using a 1 mL syringe fitted with a 22G needle.

steps.title: Seal the upper end of the Sterivex with parafilm
steps.instruction: Seal the upper end of the Sterivex with parafilm.

steps.title: Vortex at maximum speed for ~2 min
steps.instruction: Vortex at maximum speed for ~2 min.

steps.title: Invert the Sterivex 180° and vortex...
steps.instruction: Invert the Sterivex 180° and vortex again for ~2 min to ensure bead contact with both membrane surfaces.

steps.title: Using a 3 mL syringe, pull...
steps.instruction: Using a 3 mL syringe, pull the plunger upward to fill the syringe with air. Attach the syringe to the upper end of the Sterivex filter and apply firm pressure to recover the lysate into 2 mL tubes. Repeat this process as many times as necessary to ensure that the Sterivex is fully drained.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,100 × g for 1 min (manufacturer instructions)
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,100 × g for 1 min (manufacturer instructions).

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to a clean 2...
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to a clean 2 mL tube and continue extraction following the manufacturer’s protocol.

steps.title: Elute total RNA in 30–40 µL of RNase-free water
steps.instruction: Elute total RNA in 30–40 µL of RNase-free water.

steps.title: Add UV-sterilized beads into UV-sterilized 15 mL Falcon tubes
steps.instruction: Add UV-sterilized beads into UV-sterilized 15 mL Falcon tubes.

steps.title: Remove GFF, 2
steps.instruction: Remove GFF, 2.7 µm or 0.2 µm filters from storage using sterile pipette tips and place into RNA-cleaned, UV-sterilized glass Petri dishes.

steps.title: Cut filters into small pieces using...
steps.instruction: Cut filters into small pieces using sterile scalpel blades and transfer them into Falcon tubes using either the scalpel tip or sterile 100 µL pipette tips.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.8 mL Lysis/Binding Solution (kit reagent) inside the 15 mL Falcon tubes using a pippetor (if GFF or membrane filters), or inside the Sterivex using a syringe as in step A5.

steps.title: Add 100 µL β-mercaptoethanol (Sigma-Aldrich, BioUltra...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL β-mercaptoethanol (Sigma-Aldrich, BioUltra ≥99%), using 1 mL syringe fitted with a 22G needle.

steps.title: Vortex Falcon tubes for 5 min
steps.instruction: Vortex Falcon tubes for 5 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge the 15 mL Falcon tubes...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the 15 mL Falcon tubes at 3,000 × g for 5 min (RT).

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to 2 mL tubes...
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to 2 mL tubes and add 190 µL miRNA Homogenate Additive. Incubate on ice for 10 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,100 × g for 1 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,100 × g for 1 min.

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to 15 mL tubes...
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to 15 mL tubes and proceed with Acid-Phenol:Chloroform extraction (1:1 volume) per manufacturer protocol.

steps.title: Centrifuge at RT for 5 min...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at RT for 5 min Repeat this step if phase separation is not clearly visible.

steps.title: Transfer aqueous phase to new tubes...
steps.instruction: Transfer aqueous phase to new tubes and add 100% Ethanol (1.25 volumes) as per manufacturer instructions. Mix by gentle inversion to ensure homogenization.

steps.title: Pass 600 µL of the lysate/ethanol...
steps.instruction: Pass 600 µL of the lysate/ethanol mixture through the filter cartridge provided by the manufacturer. Repeat as needed until the entire sample has been processed. Complete the remaining steps according to the mirVana protocol.

steps.title: Elute total RNA in 30 µL elution buffer
steps.instruction: Elute total RNA in 30 µL elution buffer.

steps.title: Transfer 20–30 µL RNA into PCR tubes
steps.instruction: Transfer 20–30 µL RNA into PCR tubes.

steps.title: Add nuclease-free water (12
steps.instruction: Add nuclease-free water (12.5–22.5 µL depending on RNA volume).

steps.title: Add 5 µL DNase buffer
steps.instruction: Add 5 µL DNase buffer.

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 µL DNase I.

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C for 20...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C for 20 min, then hold at 4 °C.

steps.title: Add 50 µL RNase-free water to...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL RNase-free water to each 50 µL DNase-treated RNA reaction (section C).

steps.title: Elute in 30 µL
steps.instruction: Elute in 30 µL.

steps.title: Use 1:1 ratio of RNA beads...
steps.instruction: Use 1:1 ratio of RNA beads to RNA (RNAClean XP Bead-Based Reagent; see NEBNext Ultra II protocol).

steps.title: Verify absence of DNA contamination using...
steps.instruction: Verify absence of DNA contamination using PCR reactions with 16S primers prior to library prep.

steps.title: Follow Watchmaker Total RNA Library Prep...
steps.instruction: Follow Watchmaker Total RNA Library Prep Kit (Watchmaker Genomics) protocol with xGen™ Stubby Adapters (IDT), with the following modifications:

steps.title: Fragmentation time
steps.instruction: Fragmentation time: 3–6 min. Use 3 min if RNA is already partially fragmented.

steps.title: Adapter concentration
steps.instruction: Adapter concentration: 0.1 µM (from 15 µM stock), recommended for low biomass or low-water volume samples (up to 1 L).

steps.title: Follow the NEBNext® Ultra™ II RNA...
steps.instruction: Follow the NEBNext® Ultra™ II RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina (poly(A) mRNA or total RNA) protocol according to the manufacturer. Higher adaptor dilution (>100-fold in Adaptor Dilution Buffer) is recommended for low-biomass or low filtered-water-volume samples (up to 1 L).
